body: mami can you pick me up from practice today? Coach moved it to 5:30 and Daniela's mom can't cover
Depende — checking my shift now. If it flips to AM I can do 5:30, if not you're calling an Uber and I'll Venmo you. Deal?
ugh fine but also Abuela Lucia called and said you haven't called her back since Tuesday 👀
La llamo en mi break. Practice first, drama later 😂
Mami, necesito un favor — Valentina's practice ends at 5:30 Thursday and I'm on PM shift at the Grand. Can you grab her? She'll be at Bayfront Park.
Claro que sí. ¿La llevo a casa o se queda conmigo a cenar?
Take her to yours, she loves your arroz. I'll swing by after close, probably 11. Gracias, this rotation schedule is no joke.
Ay, once in a while is nothing. Solo mándame mensaje when you're leaving, no me dejes esperando despierta toda la noche. 😘
oye are you picking up Valentina from volleyball today? coach texted, they're running late — closer to 5:30
I'm on shift til 6, there's no way. can you grab her? I'll bring food to yours after, I promise
yea fine but you owe me. also mami called me TWICE looking for you lol what did you do
she calls me every morning, she knows I'm at the resort 😂 tell her I'll ring her tonight after Valentina's fed
Diego, tengo AM shift jueves y viernes — you need to pick up Valentina from volleyball Thursday. Coach said practice runs til 6:30.
Thursday's tight, I have a thing. Can she catch a ride with one of the other girls?
No. Esas mamás no van en esa dirección. Figure it out, she's not waiting alone at Bayfront after dark.
Fine, I'll move stuff around. Drop her at yours after or she stays with me Thursday night?
tengo el Albariño que te gustó last time — the one you described from that O'Brien anniversary dinner 😂 wine night still on? heading to yours by 8
sí pero I'm on Valentina's pickup after her 6pm practice, she's out around 7:45 — I'll be at yours by 8:15 tops, don't open it without me
I'll start without you 😂 also heads up Renata's coming, she texted like an hour ago
Renata? ok that changes the math. buy two bottles.
Renata camila flaked on wine night AGAIN — her third time this month. I'm not rescheduling, te lo juro. She can come to me next time 😤
Ay no. She messaged me too btw, said something about Javier. Give her one more chance?
Maybe. I'm already annoyed and it's only Thursday — just spent 45 min sorting a VIP suite crisis for a guest who brought their 'emotional support peacock' to Palmetto. I need that wine.
WAIT. A peacock. In the Grand. Elizabeth I cannot 😂 ok you've earned a full bottle, I'm coming to you
Liz, the Castellano party just pushed their yacht departure to 5pm and wants a concierge escort to the marina. You're AM shift today, right? Can you cover or do I need to grab someone?
Already on it, llamé al capitán hace diez minutos. But I'm out at 4:30 hard stop — Valentina tiene práctica y soy el pickup, no hay backup today.
Ok I'll put Marcos on the handoff at 4:15. Do the Castellanos want the charcuterie loaded on the yacht or just the champagne service?
Solo champagne, extra flutes — she doesn't do dairy, it's flagged in the folio. Make sure Marcos reads it before he leaves the lobby.
Pablo, ¿puedes recoger a Valentina del volleyball hoy? Tengo un VIP check-in que se complicó y no salgo del Palmetto hasta las 7. Diego no responde, como siempre.
Claro que sí. ¿A qué hora termina práctica?
6:15 en Bayfront. Trae agua, que siempre sale muerta de sed. Te debo una, en serio.
Ya voy. Y no me debes nada, es Valentina 🙄 habla con tu manager sobre ese horario, prima.
James, necesito confirmar — AM or PM Thursday? Valentina's club tournament is at 4, si es PM shift I need to swap someone. Camila can't cover her pickup this week.
You're AM, off by 3. Should be fine. Also heads up — Guerrero party checks in Thursday noon, they'll want you specifically.
Perfecto, that works. Los Guerreros siempre ask for the Brickell dinner rec anyway — I'll pull their folio tonight so I'm ready.
Appreciate it. Let me know if anything shifts, trying to keep the board clean this week.
Liz, Valentina's sports physical paperwork came back — she's cleared for fall season. La formulario de FHSAA está lista, you can pick it up at the front desk anytime.
Carmen gracias. I'll swing by before my shift tomorrow, I'm on at 10. She's been killing it at practice, coach wants her on varsity 🏐
Good! Tell her to hydrate — it's brutal out there in July. Her iron levels were also slightly low, worth adding some red meat or lentils.
On it. Already texting Lucia to sneak it into her cooking when Val visits this weekend. Mami will hide spinach in the arroz and Val won't even know.
Ana, Valentina rolled her ankle at volleyball practice yesterday — wrapped it overnight, swelling's down but she's already asking about Friday's game. Bring her in or wait and see?
If she can bear weight without limping, probably fine to play light. Ice 20 min before and after. Still favoring it by Thursday? Bring her in.
She's walking totally normal, just being dramatic lol. Picking her up after my AM shift anyway so I'll watch her warm up. Thanks Ana, appreciate you.
Ha, sounds about right. Text me Thursday if anything changes. Go Valentina 🏐
Hey, Sofia reminded me — are you picking up Val on Thursday after volleyball? She's got a client thing in Brickell, won't make it before 7.
Depends on my shift. If Renata covers the 5pm check-ins I should be clear by 5:15. Te confirmo esta noche.
Ok no pressure, I can grab her if you're stuck. What time does practice end?
5:30 at Tropical Park. If I'm not there by 5:20 she knows to text you — she's got the drill.
tía you still working at palmetto this weekend? me and my boys want to hit the pool saturday — any way you can pull a cabana? pregunta por favor 🙏
Saturday I'm on til 6. Cabana 4 is yours, noon to five — ask for Daniela at the pool deck, tell her I sent you. One favor: no drama con la barra.
you're literally the best. hey is it true Vale got invited to that regional tournament? mamá said tía Sofia told her something
Valentina está en la luna about it. Nada confirmed yet, so don't say anything — she's already asking me to swap shifts with Marcos.
Tía can you work magic at Palmetto Grand this Saturday? Daniela's birthday — she's been talking about that seaweed wrap forever. Como 2pm ish?
Saturday está a tope pero the spa director owes me one. Send me her last name, I'll put her in as VIP referral. No charge on the wrap.
omg THANK YOU 😭 it's Daniela Fuentes. She has no idea so pls don't put my name anywhere she might see it lol
Hecho. She checks in as resort referral, tu nombre stays off everything. Tell her to ask for Marisol at reception — she'll handle the rest.
Liz hey — moving Thurs practice to 6pm, not 5. You still good for pickup or should I loop in Diego?
AM shift this week, I'm out by 4. I got her, no need.
Ok perfect. She's been destroying the serving drills btw — that girl has serious range 🔥
Se lo heredó de su mamá 😏 Gracias Elena, see you Thursday.
Rosa, puedes recoger a Valentina del volleyball hoy? Tengo un VIP check-in que se está complicando at the Grand y mi shift no termina hasta las 7. Coach says practice ends at 6:30.
Claro, no problem. Should I drop her at your place or wait with her?
Drop her off, she has her key. Le digo que vayas tú. Gracias, te debo una 🙏
Ya la segunda vez this month jaja. Bring me a pastelito from that bakery cart by Brickell and we're even.
Marco necesito the Peruvian lily arrangement for suite 1408 by 3pm — VIP check-in y el huésped es *muy* particular. Palmetto Grand no perdona errores hoy 😬 ¿puedes confirmar?
Done. Same driver as Thursday, delivery window 2–2:30. You good?
Sí perfecto — just flag me if Ernesto hits traffic on Brickell. I'm doing an AM shift so I'm picking up Valentina from volleyball at 4, necesito salir at 3:45 sharp.
Got it, I'll text you the second he leaves the warehouse. You're covered, Elizabeth.
Pat, necesito mover el martes — I've got Valentina's volleyball pickup at 4 and my shift runs late. ¿Tienes algo Thursday morning before 9?
Thursday 8:15 works, I'll move you. Also — Valentina's overdue for her cleaning, want to stack them back to back if she's with you?
Sí, let's do it. She'll complain the whole drive down Brickell but she'll survive 😂 Book us both.
Done. You're 8:15, Val's 8:45. See you Thursday — tell her I have the good mint polish.
Sandra — jueves Valentina tiene práctica a las 5:30. I'm on AM shift at the resort so I can do pickup after. Does Mia need a ride too?
Oh thank god yes — I have back-to-back calls until 6. Are you sure it's not too much trouble?
It's fine. Have her out front by 5:15, I'll text when I'm pulling in.
Will do! The girls are gonna lose it 😂 thank you Elizabeth seriously
Alejandra, ¿puedes recoger a Valentina del volleyball hoy? Turno hasta las 7, práctica termina 5:30 en Coconut Grove. Diego no contesta.
Claro, llego 5:20. ¿La llevo a tu mamá después o directo a tu casa?
A mi apartamento, Lucía ya está ahí. Te debo una — cena en el Palmetto Grand, en serio, te pongo en el libro.
Jaja deal 😂 Mándame el address del court otra vez, creo que lo borré
